hero_subtitle: SFTY helps crypto businesses operationalize MAS guidelines by connecting jurisdiction-specific rules, Travel Rule workflows, onboarding and screening into one auditable compliance layer.

problem_title: Compliance gaps persist across MAS requirements
problem_description: Crypto businesses often struggle to keep MAS-specific rules, onboarding standards and Travel Rule obligations aligned within fragmented compliance tools. This leads to slower reviews, weaker audit readiness and challenges managing multi-jurisdiction workflows under MAS expectations.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links MAS-specific regulatory rules, onboarding checks, Travel Rule messages and case evidence into one structured workflow enabling VASPs to manage reviews with stronger audit readiness and operational clarity.
workflow_title: From regulatory updates to internal rules
workflow_description: SFTY tracks MAS regulatory changes and maps updates into internal policies, supporting rule configuration, review workflows and compliance audit evidence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for MAS crypto compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer tailored for MAS-regulated VASPs, connecting jurisdiction-specific rules, regulatory changes, onboarding, screening, and reporting into one workflow.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support MAS Travel Rule workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY manages MAS Travel Rule by routing originator and beneficiary data, tracking message status, handling exceptions, and linking events to cases and evidence for regulatory review.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves a complete audit trail including decision logs, supporting evidence, regulatory rule changes, and case history to help compliance teams prepare for audits and inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects seamlessly above existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, orchestrating their outputs without disrupting current systems or workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but converts their outputs into structured workflows, decisions, regulatory rule updates, cases, evidence packages and reports.
final_title: Structure MAS compliance workflows with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects MAS-specific rules, Travel Rule events, onboarding and screening into structured, auditable compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
